zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Morley ,Knight於1344年出生在英國諾福爾可洛頓時，他的父親Robert DeMorley51歲，母親Joan DeTyes41歲。他於1371年與Maud Barry verch Thomas在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1379年4月在威爾士享年35歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾利安桑特福拉德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Morley ,Knight于1344年出生在英国諾福爾可洛頓时，他的父亲Robert DeMorley51岁，母亲Joan DeTyes41岁。他于1371年与Maud Barry verch Thomas在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1379年4月在威尔士享年35岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾利安桑特福拉德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Morley (for example in Derbyshire, County Durham, Norfolk, and Yorkshire), or Moreleigh in Devon, all of which are named from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murghaile ‘descendant of Murghal’, a personal name based on muir ‘sea’ + gal ‘valour’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murthuile ‘descendant of Murthuile’, a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’ + tuile ‘tide’.

variants.name: Marler
meanings: occupational name from Middle English marler, either ‘spreader of marl (as fertilizer)’ or ‘hewer or quarrier of marl’.
topographic name from Middle English marlere ‘marl-pit’ (Old French marliere).
in Norfolk, perhaps also a variant of   Morley  .

variants.name: Murley
meanings: Irish (Cork and Kerry): variant of   Morley  .

English (Cornwall and Somerset): habitational name from Murley in Uplowman (Devon). The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. There may well have been some confusion with Morley .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Morley ,Knight was born in 1344, in Roydon, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert DeMorley, was 51 and his mother, Joan DeTyes, was 41. He married Maud Barry verch Thomas in 1371, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in April 1379, in Wales, at the age of 35, and was buried in Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Wales: Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Morley ,Knight est né en 1344, à Roydon, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert DeMorley, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Joan DeTyes, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Maud Barry verch Thomas en 1371, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1379, à Galles, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Morley ,Knight 1344 in Roydon, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert DeMorley 51 und seine Mutter Joan DeTyes 41. Er hat 1371 in Wales Maud Barry verch Thomas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1379 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Wales und wurde in Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Morley ,Knight è nato il nel 1344 nel Roydon, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert DeMorley, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Joan DeTyes, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Maud Barry verch Thomas nel 1371, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1379, nel Galles, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Morley ,Knightが1344年にイギリスノーフォルクロイドンで生まれた時，父Robert DeMorleyは51歳，母Joan DeTyesは41歳であった。1371年にウェールズでMaud Barry verch Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1379年4月にウェールズで35歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランサントフラエドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Morley ,Knight(이)가 1344년 영국 노르폴크 로이던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert DeMorley(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan DeTyes(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1371년 웨일스에서 Maud Barry verch Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 4월 웨일스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜산트프라이드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Morley ,Knight nasceu em 1344, em Roydon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert DeMorley, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Joan DeTyes, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Barry verch Thomas em 1371, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1379, em Gales, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ro.Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Wales: Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Morley ,Knight родился в 1344 г. в местности роидон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert DeMorley было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Joan DeTyes, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Barry verch Thomas в 1371 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1379 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности ллансантффрэед, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Morley ,Knight nació en 1344, en Roydon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert DeMorley, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Joan DeTyes, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Maud Barry verch Thomas en 1371, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1379, en Gales, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Llansantffraed, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
